ground_truth.title: San Francisco Local Movers - Moving Services & Help
ground_truth.author: Tyler Brown
ground_truth.main_content: Bellhop is a licensed and insured moving company offering reliable, low-cost moving services in San Francisco, CA. The company provides transparent pricing with straightforward rates and a prorated pricing system. Bellhop's background-checked local movers are highly rated, and customers receive photos of their moving team in advance. The company offers flexible booking with the ability to reschedule or adjust moves as needed, including last-minute moving services. Bellhop was named a Best Mover of 2022 and 2023 by U.S. News & World Report, ranking #2 overall out of 30+ moving businesses. The company has completed over 300,000 moves, received 20,000+ customer reviews, and maintains a 4.8-star average rating. Services include local San Francisco movers for full-service moves, cross-country and long-distance moving with customized plans, and hourly moving help for loading, unloading, or rearranging without transportation. Professional packing services are available, with packers who can prepare homes in hours. The booking process is simple and quick, with no hidden fees, and customers can cancel free of charge up to 72 hours before their reservation date. FAQ information reveals the average move cost in San Francisco was $560 in 2022, with apartment moves averaging $530, and most local moves requiring 3 movers plus a truck and driver.
